summary: Iteration 149: Trial Graduation Modal - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Backend trial-summary endpoint returns trial activity data with has_trial, trial_expired, highlights, total_activities, credits_used, (2) Expired trial user (grad_test_522@test.com) shows trial_expired=true with activity highlights, (3) Admin user (kyndsmiles) shows has_trial=false, (4) my-plan for expired trial shows trial.expired=true with expired_at timestamp, (5) TrialGraduation component renders as portal with 'Your cosmic trial has concluded' header, (6) Modal shows activity highlight cards (Spiritual Coaching, Cosmos Conversations), (7) Upgrade button navigates to /pricing?from=trial&highlight=plus, (8) Dismiss button stores key in localStorage to prevent showing again, (9) Close (X) button also dismisses and stores localStorage, (10) Cosmos AI button is translucent glass-morphic (rgba + backdrop-filter blur).
test_credentials: Admin: kyndsmiles@gmail.com / password. Expired trial user: grad_test_522@test.com / testpass123
seed_data_creation: None - used existing expired trial user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trial Graduation feature fully implemented and tested. TrialGraduation component at /app/frontend/src/components/TrialGraduation.js renders as portal at document.body level. Modal appears when creditInfo.trial.expired === true AND localStorage doesn't have dismissal for that expired_at timestamp. Key test-ids: trial-graduation-overlay, trial-graduation-modal, trial-graduation-upgrade, trial-graduation-dismiss, trial-graduation-close. Backend trial-summary endpoint at /api/subscriptions/trial-summary aggregates activity from: gemini_sessions, coach_sessions, mixer_sessions, journal_entries, mood_entries, meditation_sessions, oracle_readings, starseed_journeys, realm_visits. CosmicAssistant button uses translucent glass-morphic styling (rgba(129,140,248,0.12) + backdrop-filter blur(20px)).
